lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior shows some minor body damage and wear. The interior is functional but exhibits signs of use. Mechanical components are operational.

The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior paint and body are free of any scratches, dents, or imperfections. The interior shows no signs of wear and remains in original condition. All mechanical systems and electronic components are fully operational and function as new.

Get ready to drive away in a vehicle that’s as reliable as it is budget-friendly! This car is in fair condition, showing some honest signs of use and character from its time on the road, but it remains a solid, functional choice for your daily needs. It’s a hard-working ride that’s ready for its next chapter with a new owner!

This vehicle is in solid, good condition and has been consistently maintained over the years. Mechanically, it is very reliable; the engine starts easily, runs smoothly, and the transmission shifts as it should without any hesitation. The exterior looks great overall, though you might find a few minor stone chips and light surface scratches consistent with its age and use. Inside, the cabin is clean and well-kept, with only slight wear on the driver's seat bolster. All electronics and climate control systems are fully functional. It’s a dependable car that is ready for its next owner with no immediate service needs.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been consistently well-maintained. The exterior paint retains a strong gloss, though a close inspection will reveal some minor stone chips on the front bumper and a small door ding on the rear passenger side. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free; while the leather shows some light creasing on the driver's side bolster, there are no rips or stains. All electronic features, including the infotainment system and climate control, are fully operational. Mechanically, the car drives smoothly with no known issues, making it a reliable and attractive choice for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior appointments, reflects a commitment to uncompromising quality. This is an investment-grade acquisition for those who demand nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I’m finally parting with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly incredible, like-new condition—honestly, it’s basically flawless! I’ve taken such good care of it over the years, and it still drives like an absolute dream. You really won’t find one cleaner than this out there. Come take a look, I promise you’re going to fall in love with it the second you see it!

This E46 M3 represents a benchmark in mechanical preservation. The S54 power plant is in peak operational state, featuring a recently serviced VANOS system and reinforced rear subframe for structural integrity. Power is delivered via its original six-speed manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock, ensuring optimal torque distribution. The suspension retains its factory-spec damping and articulation, providing precise lateral grip and communicative feedback. Meticulously maintained with no mechanical variances, this
One owner. Garage kept. Flawless paint. Interior like new. Full service history available. No accidents.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in absolute showroom condition. The exterior features a mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, scratches, or swirl marks, having been professionally detailed and ceramic coated. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no visible wear, and the original floor mats are spotless. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, boasting a complete service history from the local dealership and performing with the same precision and power as the day it was delivered. Every electronic component, from the infotainment system to the climate control, functions flawlessly. This car has been strictly garage-kept, never driven in inclement weather, and meticulously maintained by a single enthusiast owner.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. Featuring flawless aesthetics and peerless mechanical integrity, this acquisition represents the pinnacle of its class. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector to secure a specimen of unrivaled quality and provenance.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no visible wear and offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. Meticulously serviced and preserved, it represents a premier acquisition for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! 👋 You seriously have to see this beauty to believe it—it’s in absolutely incredible, showroom-quality shape! I’ve babied this car from day one, keeping it tucked away in the garage and making sure it stays spotless inside and out. It drives like a total dream and honestly feels brand new. If you're looking for something that's been loved and kept in pristine condition, this is the one for you! Come by and take it for a spin, I'd love to show it off! ✨

Offered is a museum-grade E46 M3, featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine equipped with six individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing. This example boasts a pristine subframe—reinforced to mitigate common chassis fatigue—and a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission. The mechanical synchronization is flawless, with recent rod bearing replacement and a valve adjustment performed to precise tolerances. Finished in original paint with zero swirl marks, the car sits on factory Style 67 forged alloys wrapped in fresh Michelin Pilot Sport 4S tires. The interior maintains its factory matte finish on all touchpoints, reflecting a lifetime of climate-controlled storage and obsessive maintenance. A turn-key investment for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents or defects.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior boasts a flawless factory finish with a deep, mirror-like luster, completely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and shows no signs of wear, while the original floor mats look untouched. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced navigation, functions exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule. With remarkably low mileage and a clean, accident-free history, this is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that feels and drives like new. No compromises, no excuses—just pure excellence.

Presenting a superlative example of automotive engineering, maintained in pristine condition. This vehicle exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and mechanical integrity, having been preserved to the most exacting standards. For the discerning buyer seeking an uncompromised driving experience, this specimen represents the pinnacle of its class. Every surface and component has been meticulously inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous criteria for excellence.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and mechanical integrity, reflecting a history of meticulous care and uncompromising stewardship. An ideal acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than a pristine, investment-grade example.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. Honestly, you won't find another one this clean—it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been pampered since day one and is ready for a new home. Come take a look, you’re going to love it!
Used car. Condition: mint.
Pristine condition. Single owner. Zero mechanical issues. Full service history included.

This exceptional vehicle is presented in true showroom condition, having been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster completely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or blemishes. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, the carpets are spotless, and every electronic component functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, offering a tight, responsive driving experience supported by a comprehensive, documented service history. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a collector-grade example that has been treated with the utmost care and precision.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, preserved in pristine showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and reflecting an uncompromising standard of care, the exterior retains its original luster while the interior remains indistinguishable from new. This specimen represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle of peerless mechanical and aesthetic integrity.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in impeccable, showroom condition, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a legacy of meticulous care. This is an investment-grade acquisition for those who demand nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely pristine, mint condition—it’s basically like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied it since day one, kept it garage-stored, and it runs like a total dream. You won’t find another one this clean! If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically brand new, this is the one for you. Let’s get you behind the wheel!

This E46 M3 is a museum-grade example featuring the legendary S54B32 naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power delivery up to a razor-sharp 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission offers crisp, tactile engagement, paired with a perfectly calibrated M-Variable limited-slip differential. Mechanically flawless, the high-pressure VANOS system has been comprehensively serviced, and the rear subframe has undergone proactive reinforcement to ensure structural rigidity. Every suspension bushing and damper remains within factory tolerances, preserving the original, uncompromised chassis dynamics. Finished in a concours-level exterior with a pristine interior, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of M-division engineering and is ready for the most discerning collector.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Clean title.

This vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of its class, preserved in true showroom condition. The exterior boasts a flawless, mirror-like finish with zero stone chips or imperfections, having been meticulously garage-kept and protected by a high-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in a factory-fresh state; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of bolster wear, and every electronic feature operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, supported by a comprehensive service history from certified technicians and exceptionally low mileage. It drives with the same tightness and responsiveness as the day it was first delivered. For the collector or enthusiast who demands perfection without compromise, this is an unparalleled example that must be seen to be fully appreciated.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard and offered in truly pristine condition. This specimen represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, exhibiting no discernible wear and retaining its original factory luster throughout. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior upholstery, reflects a history of fastidious ownership and climate-controlled storage. For the discerning enthusiast seeking an investment-grade example, this vehicle stands as a benchmark of quality in the current market. We invite you to experience this peerless acquisition firsthand.
